name: Maxun
tagline: Open-source no-code platform that turns any website into a structured API
seoTitle: Maxun — No-Code Web Scraping & Data Extraction
metaDescription: Maxun is an open-source no-code platform for web scraping, crawling, and AI data extraction. Build robots to turn any website into a structured API or spreadsheet.
overview: Maxun is an open-source no-code platform for turning the web into structured, reliable data. You build automated tools called robots that navigate websites, extract information, and organize the results, all without writing any code.

There are four kinds of robots, each for a different job: Extract collects structured data by emulating real user behavior, Scrape converts full pages into clean Markdown or HTML, Crawl walks an entire site, and Search runs automated web searches. You can use the hosted version at app.maxun.dev or self-host the platform yourself.
features: Recorder Mode: record your clicks as you browse and Maxun turns them into a reusable extraction robot
AI Mode: describe the data you want in natural language and let LLM-powered extraction handle it
Handles pagination, scrolling, and extraction behind a login automatically
Turns websites into RESTful API endpoints or exports straight to Google Sheets and Airtable
Runs robots on a schedule and adapts when a site's layout changes
Self-hostable with a developer SDK, CLI, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) support

gettingStarted.intro: The fastest way to try Maxun is the hosted version at app.maxun.dev. If you prefer to run it yourself, Maxun self-hosts locally with or without Docker.

steps.heading: Try the hosted app
steps.body: No setup needed. Open the hosted version in your browser and start building robots right away.

steps.heading: Self-host with Docker Compose
steps.body: Maxun can run locally with Docker Compose. Follow the official Docker setup guide to bring up the platform, then open the local UI to start recording extraction robots.

steps.heading: Build a robot and extract data
steps.body: Use Recorder Mode to record your browsing actions, or AI Mode to describe what you want in plain language. Maxun saves your steps as a reusable robot you can run on a schedule or call as an API.

useCases: Turn websites that have no API into structured data feeds for lead generation, market research, or content aggregation
Export scraped listings, prices, or reviews directly into Google Sheets or Airtable on a recurring schedule
Produce clean Markdown from web pages to feed AI workflows, agents, and document processing pipelines
